author: Haroen Viaene
subject: Feat(refinementList): add widget (algolia/vue-instantsearch#467)
body:
* docs(refinementlist): initial

* docs: add options

* feat: add placeholder files

* chore: connector optional

* chore(SearchBox): refactor into real component & controlled

* chore: add RefinementList to IS

* feat(RefinementList): rendering

* Update V2_PROGRESS.md

* chore: remove old docs

* docs: consistent OR

* feat: search highlighting & some more

* docs: add customisation stories

* test

* docs(transformItems): consistency

* chore: move searchInput to v-model

* fix: use correct this

* fix: pass noop to toggleShowMore

* feat: type for `sortBy`

* chore: don't pass showMore on

* chore: add & document more slots

* chore: inline v-if & else

* chore: pass disabled to showMore

* fix: correct slotty and showMore goodness

* chore: use correct state prop

* docs: add classes

* fix(types): just comma, not |

* chore: fix import

* fix(searchable): reset query on refine

* chore(searchbox): have fallback for query

* feat(highlighting): add _highlightResult to the item

This way it's usable as the content for the RFL

* chore: easier syntax

* feat: add no results slot

* feat: no-refinement

* chore: update tests

* fix(component): merge conflict resolution

* chore: fix linting

* fix: correct type for `operator`

* fix(rollup): make sure there's no invalid syntax in replacements

* chore(rollup): don't transform process.env on esm/cjs because users do that on their end

* chore: add panel & fix --noRefinement
